name: In Love with Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, water, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time and beat until just combined.
3. Sift together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Mix into the batter at low speed just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips. Divide dough in half. Spread dough into 2 greased 8-inch (20 cm) round cake pans.
4. Bake one pan at a time for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden. Do not overbake. Cool on wire racks for 5 minutes. Using a 2-inch heart-shaped cookie cutter with the point towards the center, cut out cookies. Transfer cookies to foil-lined baking sheets and cool completely.
5. Melt white chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl at 100% (HIGH) power for 30 seconds. Stir, then continue microwaving at 30-second intervals until smooth. Spread melted chocolate over cooled cookies. Cut pineapple into 2-inch (5 cm) hearts no more than 1/4-inch (6 mm) thick. Place a red candied pineapple heart on top of each cookie. Allow to set completely.
Makes: About 1 dozen cookies
